name: AEGIS WF7 — Wildfire Fire Danger Monitor

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incidentType: $json.incidentType, severity: $json.severity, probability: $json.probability, message: 'Fire Danger Index: ' + $json.fdi + '. AQI: ' + $json.aqi + '. Action: ' + $json.action, source: 'n8n_wildfire_monitor', metadata: { fdi: $json.fdi, aqi: $json.aqi, temp: $json.temp, humidity: $json.humidity } }) }}
